onboarding_step0_body: Arrr! Unustasis be an open-source app fer the unu Scooter Pro. Connect yer ship to get started, me heartie.
onboarding_step1_body: Make sure yer ship be turned on and stand next to it. Begin searchin' when ye be ready.
onboarding_step2_body: This could take a few seconds, me matey.
onboarding_step2_body_error: Make sure the ship be turned on and nearby, me heartie.
onboarding_step3_body: A ship with the address {address} be found and be ready to connect, me matey.
onboarding_step4_body: Ye should get a pairin' request in a second, so keep an eye on yer notifications. Ye can find the pairin' code on the ship display, arrr!
onboarding_step4_explainer: Important: If ye get multiple pairin' requests, ye shall confirm all of 'em!
onboarding_step4_error: Connection failed, arrr! Make sure the ship be powered on and nearby, then try again.
onboarding_step5_body: Yer ship be connected and be ready to use. Enjoy yer ride, me heartie!
onboarding_step6_body: Give yer ship a name and pick her colors, arrr!
old_app_alert_body:
A ship can only have one captain at a time. Therefore, if ye keep yer old captain around, it might cause rivalries at the helm.

In those cases, put yer old captain in their place (disable background connection in the old app settings) or make 'em walm the plank!
bluetooth_error_generic: Error durin' search or connect, arrr!
seat_alert_title: Arrr! The treasure chest be open!
seat_alert_body:
Yer ship didn't lock 'cause the treasure chest be still open.

If ye still want to lock yer ship, ye can override this warnin'.
locked_handlebar_alert_body: Turn ye helm all the way to the left, and restart ye ship.
unlocked_handlebar_alert_body: Turn ye helm all the way to the left, and secure ye ship again.
state_name_off: Powered off, like a sunken ship
state_name_ready: Hoist the anchor! Ready to set sail
state_name_linking: Joinin' forces with the app, arrr!
state_desc_standby: Shhh! Yer ship be takin' a nap
state_desc_off: Yer ship be as dead as Davy Jones' locker
state_desc_parked: Yer ship be ready for adventure, like a loyal crewmate
state_desc_ready: Onward! Yer ship be sailin' the high seas!
state_desc_hibernating: Yer ship be restin' in a deep, deep slumber
state_desc_hibernating_imminent: Yer ship be driftin' into hibernation soon, give it a few minutes!
state_desc_unknown: Yer ship be lost at sea
state_desc_linking: Yer ship be joinin' forces with the app as we speak!
stats_nfc_not_available: Arr! Your device doesn't support NFC!
stats_nfc_instructions: Hold yer phone under the NFC tag on the bottom of the battery, arrr!
stats_nfc_notice: If you're having trouble, try moving your phone around a bit. It might also be that your phone's NFC antenna is too weak.
stats_location_disclaimer: This shows the last location where yer ship was last linked to yer phone. This ain't real-time trackin', so don't let yer ship get plundered!
settings_background_scan_description: Link up with yer ship, even with yer app shut tight!
notification_channel_service_description: Needed fer keepin' watch below deck. Ye can hide this channel.
notification_channel_connection_descript: Shows yer vessel's status an' quick commands.
notification_service_content: To hide this here notice, hold it down an' disable this channel, savvy?
settings_biometrics_description: Require yer fingerprint or face recognition to get on board
biometrics_message: Authenticate to access the app, ye scurvy dog.
biometrics_failed: Arrr! Authentication failed, walk the plank!
settings_auto_unlock_description: Automatically unlock yer ship when the app be open and the ship be right next to ye. Beware: Might slow down the connection to yer ship on iOS
settings_open_seat_on_unlock_description: Automatically open the treasure chest when unlockin' yer ship.
settings_hazard_locking_description: Automatically alert yer crew while boardin' or droppin' anchor.
support_garages_none: Here be dragons. Might be an issue with yer location.
forget_alert_body: Arrr! To board again, ye'll need to go though the setup process again, me heartie.
settings_osm_consent_description: Use online services to resolve the last known scooter location to a street address
stats_no_location: Tap to view on treasure map
controls_hard_reboot_confirm_message: This be power-cyclin' the scooter. Only do it when she's idle and ready fer it.
settings_report: Report an issue with yer app
settings_report_description:
If the app doesn't work as expected, you can send a report to the developers.

The report will include error logs from the last few minutes, so please use this feature directly after the error occurs.
report_placeholder: Please describe the issue you're having, and how to reproduce it, above the line:
support_contact_emco: Report an issue with yer ship
widget_onboarding_body: Ye can now steer yer scooter straight from yer shipdeck without botherin' with that blasted app!
bgscan_warning_accidentalturnon: If ye have the ghost ship enabled, yer magic talkbox might unwittin’ unlock or open yer ship just by driftin’ past. Always make sure yer ship be locked tight ‘fore leavin’ her in the treacherous waters o’ the public!
bgscan_warning_battery: Yer magic talkbox’ll be burnin’ through its lifeblood faster—up to 5 to 10 percent lost with each charge, dependin’ on the beast ye carry. Worry not, though—yer ship’s heart stays untouched.
bgscan_warning_intro: Background scannin’ be in the beta brig, and may stir up trouble such as one or more o’ these cursed effects:
bgscan_warning_lostpairing: Loss o’ pairin’! If ye linger too long on the edge o’ yer ship’s ghostly range, the bond may break, and ye’ll need yer keycard to unlock ‘er and forge the link anew.
stats_auto_connect_off: Will only board ship on your command, captain!
stats_auto_connect_on: Will board ship as soon as it's in the port
location_services_disabled: Yer navigation be disabled, matey! Enable it in yer ship's settings to chart the course.
location_permission_denied: We need permission to use yer navigation to find nearby ships, captain!
location_permission_denied_forever: Navigation permission be locked in Davy Jones' locker! Ye must free it from yer device settings.
notification_permission_denied: We need permission to send ye messages for background scannin', arr!
activity_log_error: Your activity log could not be read, and may include corrupted data. If this problem persists, you may want to clear your log and start over.
activity_log_empty: Here be dragons. Time to set sail!
activity_log_disclaimer: Your logbook is stored safely at your helm, and no one shall ever lay their eyes on it!
activity_log_cleared: Yer Logbook has been wiped empty
activity_log_clear_confirm_message: Once deleted, your logbook with all of your adventures in it will be lost forever and become only the stuff of legends.
stats_nfc_not_enabled: You gotta turn on your phone's NFC first, matey!
share_no_librescoot_body: Sailin' to shared ports be needin' a vessel with Librescoot charts. Librescoot adds navigation, spyglass diagnostics, and more to yer unu Scooter Pro.
share_parse_error: Couldn't find no port in that there message, cap'n.
ls_settings_clock_subtitle: Sets the vessel's chronometer to this device's current time, arr!
ls_settings_clock_error: Failed to update ship's clock, arr. Result: {result}
ls_settings_auto_lock_subtitle: Lock the vessel after she's been idle for a spell
ls_settings_auto_hibernate_subtitle: Put the vessel to slumber after she's been idle for a spell
ls_settings_update_mode_on_subtitle: Yer scooter be in update mode. Toggle to return to port.
ls_settings_update_mode_off_subtitle: Puts the vessel into update mode for firmware updates via USB. Sail with caution, arr!
ls_settings_update_mode_enter_success: Update mode activated, arr! Wait while the ship applies the change.
ls_settings_update_mode_exit_success: Update mode deactivated, arr! Wait while the ship applies the change.
ls_keycard_delete_error: Failed to plunder that keycard, arr!
ls_keycard_delete_confirm: Arr, are ye sure ye want to scuttle this keycard? There be no turning back!
ls_keycard_add_tap1: Tap a compatible NFC card to the back of yer phone, arr!
ls_keycard_add_tap2: Card spotted! Tap the same card again to confirm, arr!
ls_keycard_nfc_unavailable: NFC ain't available on this here vessel.
ls_keycard_nfc_disabled: To use this feature, enable NFC in yer device's settings, arr!
ls_keycard_read_error: Couldn't read the card's secret, arr. Try again, matey!
ls_keycard_already_registered: This card's already in the log, arr!
ls_keycard_mismatch: This card might not be seaworthy, or there were stormy seas while reading it. Try again, arr!
nav_timeout_cached: Connection timed out, showin' last known ports, arr.
nav_far_away_body: This port be about {km} nautical miles from yer scooter's last known location. Set sail anyway?
nav_confirmation_body_pending: Navigation will start when ye connect to yer scooter, arr!
nav_status_active_subtitle: Follow the charts on yer scooter's display.
nav_status_pending_subtitle: Yer scooter will sail to {destination} next time ye connect.
nav_disconnected_subtitle: Connect yer scooter to see saved ports.
nav_empty_subtitle: Pull down to search the seas.
ls_keycard_ios_unsupported: Couldn't detect yer card, matey? Make sure it be plunderable by iOS (MIFARE, ISO 7816, ISO 15693).
ls_keycard_add_success: Keycard added to yer crew, arrr!
